I'll also identify the Rindler horizon and clarify its nature. Part 2 involves deriving the Unruh temperature for a massless scalar quantum field in the Minkowski vacuum. This is a fun challenge!**Confirming the findings**

I can confidently say "CONFIRMED" based on the mathematics of the derivatives. The metric coefficient is zero when ξ = -c²/a, which indicates the Rindler horizon coordinate singularity.
